questions.question: Describe the primary purpose of normalization in a database management system. (5 marks)
questions.hint: Normalization is the process of organizing the data in a database to minimize data redundancy and dependency

questions.question: Explain the difference between a candidate key and a primary key in a database. (5 marks)
questions.hint: A candidate key is a set of attributes that uniquely identifies a record, while a primary key is a unique identifier for each record

questions.question: What is the purpose of a database schema in a database management system? (5 marks)
questions.hint: A database schema is a visual representation of the database structure, defining the relationships between tables and fields
